NOTE: Ce fichier contient les references UI HTML. Versions RN implementees:
- `app/src/features/onboarding/screens/WelcomeScreen.js`
- `app/src/features/onboarding/screens/LanguageScreen.js`
- `app/src/features/auth/screens/SignupScreen.js`
- `app/src/features/auth/screens/SmsSignupScreen.js`
- `app/src/features/auth/screens/QrSignupScreen.js`

Page bienvenu (welcome get stared)

Code: 

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>  
\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso \- Get Started\</title\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" rel="preconnect"/\>  
\<link crossorigin="" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" rel="preconnect"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;700;800;900\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {  
                        "DEFAULT": "0.25rem",  
                        "lg": "0.5rem",  
                        "xl": "0.75rem",  
                        "2xl": "1rem",  
                        "full": "9999px"  
                    },  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>

      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);

  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark font-display text-slate-900 dark:text-white antialiased overflow-x-hidden selection:bg-primary selection:text-white"\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-hidden"\>  
\<div class="absolute inset-0 z-0 pointer-events-none overflow-hidden"\>  
\<div class="absolute top-\[-10%\] left-\[-10%\] w-\[50%\] h-\[40%\] bg-green-500/10 dark:bg-green-500/5 rounded-full blur-\[80px\]"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-\[20%\] right-\[-10%\] w-\[60%\] h-\[50%\] bg-primary/10 dark:bg-primary/5 rounded-full blur-\[100px\]"\>\</div\>

\<div class="flex h-8 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-x-2 rounded-full bg-slate-200/50 dark:bg-\[\#233648\]/80 backdrop-blur-sm pl-3 pr-4 shadow-sm border border-slate-300/50 dark:border-slate-700/50"\>

\<p class="text-slate-700 dark:text-white text-xs font-semibold leading-normal"\>Offline Ready\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="relative z-10 flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center min-h-0"\>  
\<div class="px-6 pb-6 pt-2 flex flex-col gap-5"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center gap-3"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-1.5"\>  
\<div class="h-10 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-green-500 shadow-lg shadow-green-500/30"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-10 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-yellow-500 shadow-lg shadow-yellow-500/30"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-10 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-red-500 shadow-lg shadow-red-500/30"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<span class="text-4xl font-black tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white"\>Yabisso\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<h1 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight text-\[32px\] font-extrabold leading-\[1.1\]"\>  
        Power in \<span class="text-primary"\>Your Pocket\</span\>  
\</h1\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory scroll-smooth px-6 pb-8 \[-ms-scrollbar-style:none\] \[scrollbar-width:none\] \[\&amp;::-webkit-scrollbar\]:hidden"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-4"\>  
\<div class="snap-center flex w-\[80vw\] max-w-\[320px\] flex-col gap-4 shrink-0"\>  
\<div class="relative w-full aspect-\[4/5\] overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shadow-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700"\>  
\<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-center bg-cover bg-no-repeat transition-transform duration-500 hover:scale-105" data-alt="3D illustration of a floating smartphone with shopping bags and coins in vibrant colors" style='background-image: url("https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuByfdMc6LN8fJk9RqqdqPUpXyzmxmo9ZoNclGSxvJjFhn0gTT7LuuWoDjZPY1PAG2Q0b-D3zZLVkswL16dE7OaVWFXdKry6fQ6GpniRmq6Z2CD4RehQjVz4YM4OC3TYjq\_Doy5n43aW9uwGdNfXChGYBhpzASnCDdPCvt54XZQmLOwVuQrL-B9t1g-uaiQXf1cQxxPkOCV45okZBdrVsghHOEhlagVCvFmRHpV4Jl3SK3hfTv3Zpg50Uql2lq-vH3x7L6dzzK4b");'\>  
\</div\>

\<p class="text-white text-xl font-bold mb-2"\>One App for Everything\</p\>  
\<p class="text-slate-300 text-sm leading-relaxed"\>Shop, pay, and eat across Africa—even without an internet connection.\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="snap-center flex w-\[80vw\] max-w-\[320px\] flex-col gap-4 shrink-0"\>  
\<div class="relative w-full aspect-\[4/5\] overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-slate-200 dark:bg-slate-800 shadow-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-700"\>

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>  
\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso \- Choose Language\</title\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "primary-dark": "\#0b6bcb",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#111a22", // Matching the component example background  
                        "surface-dark": "\#1c2630",  
                        "brand-green": "\#009B4D",  
                        "brand-yellow": "\#FFD200",  
                        "brand-red": "\#CE1126",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px"},  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>::-webkit-scrollbar {  
            width: 4px;  
        }  
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {  
            background: transparent;  
        }  
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {  
            background: \#324d67;  
            border-radius: 4px;  
        }.language-card {  
            transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out;  
        }  
        .language-radio:checked \~ .language-content {  
            color: \#ffffff;  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="font-display antialiased bg-white dark:bg-background-dark text-slate-900 dark:text-white transition-colors duration-200"\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-full min-h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-x-hidden"\>  
\<div class="h-1.5 w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-brand-green via-brand-yellow to-brand-red"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="sticky top-0 z-20 flex items-center bg-white/95 dark:bg-background-dark/95 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 pb-2 justify-between border-b border-transparent dark:border-white/5"\>  
\<button class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white flex size-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[24px\]"\>arrow\_back\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-lg font-bold leading-tight tracking-\[-0.015em\] flex-1 text-center pr-10"\>Language\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex-1 flex flex-col w-full max-w-md mx-auto"\>  
\<div class="px-4 pt-6 pb-2"\>  
\<h1 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight text-\[32px\] font-extrabold leading-tight text-left mb-2"\>Welcome to Yabisso\</h1\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-base font-normal leading-normal"\>  
                    Please select your preferred language to customize your experience.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-3 p-4 pb-24" style="--radio-dot-svg: url('data:image/svg+xml,%3csvg viewBox=%270 0 16 16%27 fill=%27rgb(19,127,236)%27 xmlns=%27http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%27%3e%3ccircle cx=%278%27 cy=%278%27 r=%273.5%27/%3e%3c/svg%3e');"\>  
\<label class="group relative flex items-center gap-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-\[\#324d67\] bg-white dark:bg-\[\#1a242d\] p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 dark:hover:border-primary/50 transition-all shadow-sm language-card has-\[:checked\]:border-primary dark:has-\[:checked\]:border-primary has-\[:checked\]:bg-blue-50/50 dark:has-\[:checked\]:bg-\[\#137fec\]/10"\>  
\<input checked="" class="peer sr-only language-radio" name="language\_selection" type="radio" value="en-UK"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center h-6 w-6 rounded-full border-2 border-slate-300 dark:border-\[\#4b5563\] peer-checked:border-primary peer-checked:bg-\[image:--radio-dot-svg\] bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-\[length:100%\_100%\] transition-all"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="flex grow flex-col language-content"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-semibold leading-normal"\>English (United Kingdom)\</p\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-sm"\>English\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<span class="text-2xl"\>🇬🇧\</span\>  
\</label\>  
\<label class="group relative flex items-center gap-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-\[\#324d67\] bg-white dark:bg-\[\#1a242d\] p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 dark:hover:border-primary/50 transition-all shadow-sm language-card has-\[:checked\]:border-primary dark:has-\[:checked\]:border-primary has-\[:checked\]:bg-blue-50/50 dark:has-\[:checked\]:bg-\[\#137fec\]/10"\>  
\<input class="peer sr-only language-radio" name="language\_selection" type="radio" value="fr-FR"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center h-6 w-6 rounded-full border-2 border-slate-300 dark:border-\[\#4b5563\] peer-checked:border-primary peer-checked:bg-\[image:--radio-dot-svg\] bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-\[length:100%\_100%\] transition-all"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="flex grow flex-col language-content"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-semibold leading-normal"\>Français (France)\</p\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-sm"\>French\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<span class="text-2xl"\>🇫🇷\</span\>  
\</label\>  
\<label class="group relative flex items-center gap-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-\[\#324d67\] bg-white dark:bg-\[\#1a242d\] p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-primary/50 dark:hover:border-primary/50 transition-all shadow-sm language-card has-\[:checked\]:border-primary dark:has-\[:checked\]:border-primary has-\[:checked\]:bg-blue-50/50 dark:has-\[:checked\]:bg-\[\#137fec\]/10"\>  
\<input class="peer sr-only language-radio" name="language\_selection" type="radio" value="sw-TZ"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center h-6 w-6 rounded-full border-2 border-slate-300 dark:border-\[\#4b5563\] peer-checked:border-primary peer-checked:bg-\[image:--radio-dot-svg\] bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-\[length:100%\_100%\] transition-all"\>\</div\>

\</div\>

\<input class="peer sr-only language-radio" name="language\_selection" type="radio" value="ha-NG"/\>

Écran : s’inscrire

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>  
\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso \- Create Account\</title\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                        "yabisso-red": "\#ef4444",  
                        "yabisso-yellow": "\#eab308",  
                        "yabisso-green": "\#22c55e",  
                        "input-bg": "\#192633",  
                        "input-border": "\#324d67",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px"},  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>.no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {  
            display: none;  
        }  
        .no-scrollbar {  
            \-ms-overflow-style: none;  
            scrollbar-width: none;  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark font-display text-slate-900 dark:text-white"\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-full min-h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-hidden max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark"\>  
\<div class="absolute top-0 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-primary/10 rounded-full blur-3xl \-translate-y-1/2 translate-x-1/2 pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 w-48 h-48 bg-yabisso-yellow/5 rounded-full blur-3xl translate-y-1/2 \-translate-x-1/2 pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="relative flex items-center p-4 pb-2 justify-between z-10"\>  
\<button class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white flex size-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 24px;"\>arrow\_back\_ios\_new\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-lg font-bold leading-tight tracking-\[-0.015em\] flex-1 text-center pr-12"\>  
                Create Account  
            \</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="h-1 w-full flex"\>  
\<div class="h-full w-1/4 bg-primary"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-full w-1/4 bg-yabisso-red"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-full w-1/4 bg-yabisso-yellow"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-full w-1/4 bg-yabisso-green"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar px-4 pt-6 pb-8 z-10"\>  
\<div class="mb-8"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 text-base font-normal leading-normal text-center"\>  
                    Sign up to access your wallet, delivery, and more.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="space-y-5"\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-2"\>  
\<label class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-medium leading-normal ml-1"\>Full Name\</label\>  
\<div class="flex w-full items-stretch rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 dark:ring-input-border bg-white dark:bg-input-bg focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-primary"\>  
\<input class="flex w-full min-w-0 flex-1 resize-none border-0 bg-transparent py-3 pl-4 text-slate-900 dark:text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 dark:placeholder:text-\[\#92adc9\] focus:ring-0 sm:text-base sm:leading-6" placeholder="John Doe" type="text"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center pr-4 pl-2 text-slate-400 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\]"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 22px;"\>person\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-2"\>  
\<label class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-medium leading-normal ml-1"\>Email or Phone\</label\>  
\<div class="flex w-full items-stretch rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 dark:ring-input-border bg-white dark:bg-input-bg focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-primary"\>  
\<input class="flex w-full min-w-0 flex-1 resize-none border-0 bg-transparent py-3 pl-4 text-slate-900 dark:text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 dark:placeholder:text-\[\#92adc9\] focus:ring-0 sm:text-base sm:leading-6" placeholder="name@example.com" type="text"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center pr-4 pl-2 text-slate-400 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\]"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 22px;"\>mail\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-2"\>  
\<label class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-medium leading-normal ml-1"\>Password\</label\>  
\<div class="flex w-full items-stretch rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 dark:ring-input-border bg-white dark:bg-input-bg focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-primary"\>  
\<input class="flex w-full min-w-0 flex-1 resize-none border-0 bg-transparent py-3 pl-4 text-slate-900 dark:text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 dark:placeholder:text-\[\#92adc9\] focus:ring-0 sm:text-base sm:leading-6" placeholder="••••••••" type="password"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center pr-4 pl-2 text-slate-400 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] cursor-pointer"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 22px;"\>visibility\_off\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-2"\>  
\<label class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-medium leading-normal ml-1"\>Confirm Password\</label\>  
\<div class="flex w-full items-stretch rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-300 dark:ring-input-border bg-white dark:bg-input-bg focus-within:ring-2 focus-within:ring-primary"\>  
\<input class="flex w-full min-w-0 flex-1 resize-none border-0 bg-transparent py-3 pl-4 text-slate-900 dark:text-white placeholder:text-slate-400 dark:placeholder:text-\[\#92adc9\] focus:ring-0 sm:text-base sm:leading-6" placeholder="••••••••" type="password"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center pr-4 pl-2 text-slate-400 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] cursor-pointer"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 22px;"\>visibility\_off\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<p class="mt-6 text-xs text-center text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400"\>  
                By creating an account, you agree to our \<a class="text-primary hover:text-blue-400 underline decoration-primary/30" href="\#"\>Terms\</a\> and \<a class="text-primary hover:text-blue-400 underline decoration-primary/30" href="\#"\>Privacy Policy\</a\>.  
            \</p\>  
\<div class="mt-8"\>  
\<button class="w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white py-3.5 px-4 text-center text-base font-bold text-white dark:text-slate-900 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/10 dark:shadow-white/10 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-\[0.98\] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 dark:focus:ring-white focus:ring-offset-2 dark:focus:ring-offset-background-dark"\>  
                    Sign Up  
                \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="relative my-8"\>  
\<div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center"\>  
\<div class="w-full border-t border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="relative flex justify-center"\>  
\<span class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark px-2 text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400"\>Or continue with\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"\>  
\<button class="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700 bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-white shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-\[\#233546\]"\>  
\<img alt="Google Logo" class="h-5 w-5" data-alt="Google colorful G logo" src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDg\_DtN1AVNkB\_ITbuGWm74v9HWXeZjBWq-7Pwy2ES5M-PFtlO4h\_bho-\_yJOaGDWMIsHUKlUVYKjr5yDXnVrI8ag\_EJ-Ep1O5WUn2cfBmhyoZ6V3CxUj4UoziAy\_gMfZu2\_e-dR3XJrJbzrTx2idmPaUgusoQvgrEMs75SN059Dtp5sw7QyMpB\_398QrGq95lcbNYcwRMmRWz\_MYP6JD1LTPWGffdQVX-5tF1ocflWjGs4IzBowGU82kAUjTUZsiHBj4T1LCZb"/\>  
\<span\>Google\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<button class="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700 bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-white shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-\[\#233546\]"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined" style="font-size: 24px;"\>ios\</span\>  
\<span\>Apple\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="mt-8 flex justify-center pb-4"\>  
\<p class="text-sm text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400"\>  
                    Already have an account?   
                    \<a class="font-semibold text-primary hover:text-blue-400 ml-1" href="\#"\>Log In\</a\>  
\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

page d'inscription

                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",

                By creating an account, you agree to our \<a class="text-primary hover:text-blue-400 underline decoration-primary/30" href="\#"\>Terms\</a\> and \<a class="text-primary hover:text-blue-400 underline decoration-primary/30" href="\#"\>Privacy Policy\</a\>.  
            \</p\>  
\<div class="mt-8"\>  
\<button class="w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white py-3.5 px-4 text-center text-base font-bold text-white dark:text-slate-900 shadow-lg shadow-slate-900/10 dark:shadow-white/10 transition-all hover:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-100 active:scale-\[0.98\] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-900 dark:focus:ring-white focus:ring-offset-2 dark:focus:ring-offset-background-dark"\>

                \</button\>

\<div class="relative my-8"\>  
\<div aria-hidden="true" class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center"\>  
\<div class="w-full border-t border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="relative flex justify-center"\>  
\<span class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark px-2 text-sm text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400"\>Or continue with\</span\>

\</div\>  
\<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"\>  
\<button class="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-300 dark:border-slate-700 bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-white shadow-sm transition-all hover:bg-slate-50 dark:hover:bg-\[\#233546\]"\>

![][image3]

Écran : signup offline via QR code

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso \- Offline Signup\</title\>  
\<\!-- Tailwind CSS \--\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<\!-- Tailwind Config \--\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "yabisso-red": "\#ef4444",  
                        "yabisso-yellow": "\#eab308",  
                        "yabisso-green": "\#22c55e",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px"},  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<\!-- Google Fonts \--\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" rel="preconnect"/\>  
\<link crossorigin="" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" rel="preconnect"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<\!-- Material Symbols \--\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark font-display text-slate-900 dark:text-white"\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-full min-h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-x-hidden max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark"\>  
\<\!-- Top App Bar \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center p-4 pb-2 justify-between z-10"\>  
\<button class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white flex size-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>arrow\_back\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-lg font-bold leading-tight tracking-\[-0.015em\] flex-1 text-center pr-12"\>Account Activation\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Main Content Area \--\>  
\<div class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-start p-6 gap-6"\>  
\<\!-- Status Card \--\>  
\<div class="w-full"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 rounded-xl bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] p-4 shadow-sm border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 relative overflow-hidden"\>  
\<\!-- Subtle African Tech Vibe Accent Strip \--\>  
\<div class="absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-1.5 bg-gradient-to-b from-yabisso-red via-yabisso-yellow to-yabisso-green"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-1 flex-1 pl-2"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center gap-2"\>  
\<span class="relative flex h-3 w-3"\>  
\<span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-yabisso-yellow opacity-75"\>\</span\>  
\<span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-3 w-3 bg-yabisso-yellow"\>\</span\>  
\</span\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-bold leading-tight"\>Pending Validation\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-sm font-normal leading-normal"\>Awaiting admin scan to sync profile\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>badge\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- QR Code Section \--\>  
\<div class="w-full flex flex-col items-center gap-4 mt-4"\>  
\<div class="relative p-6 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-\[0\_0\_20px\_rgba(19,127,236,0.15)\] dark:shadow-\[0\_0\_30px\_rgba(19,127,236,0.2)\]"\>  
\<\!-- QR Code Image \--\>  
\<div class="w-64 h-64 bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-cover rounded-sm" data-alt="Black and white QR code pattern on white background" style='background-image: url("https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuDmCAY\_EK08umdjn548zf1AFL2PEmlTDR6NsRFy5IvxaIK5Ws5TMek4YliLRktxz50Mcfc8wvmEjCOsI1P3pvBJgH6TmkCFbmdRAKgs70jYtwhC3hMuaMGmxzm1RhyWSk1BHwaLKsiXrUvSp0Xs9a5dWm5-LA6V4F7Kcl9wC5TJTZEjG4E4FXD2guLXK9lcY0USboTaJ\_9sKBWvdxQLwGfts-flcAnbwa3t\_txCRrUKOlJ758ysWKLaxKriF066LBudsQDx7nAO");'\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Decorative Corners for Tech Feel \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-4 left-4 w-6 h-6 border-t-4 border-l-4 border-primary rounded-tl-lg"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute top-4 right-4 w-6 h-6 border-t-4 border-r-4 border-primary rounded-tr-lg"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-4 left-4 w-6 h-6 border-b-4 border-l-4 border-primary rounded-bl-lg"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-4 right-4 w-6 h-6 border-b-4 border-r-4 border-primary rounded-br-lg"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Meta Text \--\>  
\<div class="text-center space-y-1"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-400 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold"\>Reference ID\</p\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-lg font-mono font-medium tracking-wider"\>\#882-AB2\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Instructional Text \--\>  
\<div class="w-full mt-2"\>  
\<h3 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-xl font-bold leading-tight text-center mb-2"\>Visit a Kiosk to Activate\</h3\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-sm font-normal text-center max-w-\[280px\] mx-auto leading-relaxed"\>  
                    Show this code to a Yabisso Agent or Kiosk partner. Your account is created locally and needs sync.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Footer Actions \--\>  
\<div class="p-6 pb-8 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark"\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-4"\>  
\<button class="flex w-full items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm px-4 py-3.5 text-sm font-bold tracking-wide hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[20px\]"\>save\_alt\</span\>  
                    Save QR to Gallery  
                \</button\>  
\<button class="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 text-primary text-sm font-semibold hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[18px\]"\>location\_on\</span\>  
                    Find nearest agent  
                \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Bottom Spacer for mobile home indicator \--\>  
\<div class="h-5 w-full bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

Écran : signup sms confirm with code pin 

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso SMS Login\</title\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800\&amp;family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "yabisso-blue": "\#137fec",  
                        "yabisso-red": "\#ef4444",  
                        "yabisso-yellow": "\#eab308",  
                        "yabisso-green": "\#22c55e",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                        "surface-dark": "\#192633",  
                        "border-dark": "\#324d67",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {  
                        "DEFAULT": "0.25rem",  
                        "lg": "0.5rem",  
                        "xl": "0.75rem",  
                        "2xl": "1rem",  
                        "full": "9999px"  
                    },  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
        /\* Custom scrollbar hide for cleaner mobile look \*/  
        .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {  
            display: none;  
        }  
        .no-scrollbar {  
            \-ms-overflow-style: none;  
            scrollbar-width: none;  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark font-display antialiased selection:bg-yabisso-blue selection:text-white"\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-full min-h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-hidden max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl bg-background-dark"\>  
\<\!-- Top Navigation \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between p-4 pt-6 z-10"\>  
\<button class="text-white hover:text-yabisso-blue transition-colors rounded-full p-2 \-ml-2"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined \!text-\[28px\]"\>arrow\_back\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<div class="flex gap-1"\>  
\<\!-- Yabisso Brand Colors Dots \--\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yabisso-blue"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yabisso-red"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yabisso-yellow"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-yabisso-green"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Main Content \--\>  
\<div class="flex-1 flex flex-col px-6 pb-6 relative z-10"\>  
\<\!-- Branding / Logo Area \--\>  
\<div class="mt-4 mb-8"\>  
\<div class="w-14 h-14 bg-gradient-to-br from-yabisso-blue to-blue-700 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center mb-6 shadow-lg shadow-yabisso-blue/20"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white \!text-\[32px\]"\>bolt\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<h1 class="text-white text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight mb-2"\>Welcome Back\</h1\>  
\<p class="text-gray-400 text-base leading-relaxed"\>  
                    Enter your mobile number to log in or create a new Yabisso account.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Form Section \--\>  
\<div class="space-y-8"\>  
\<\!-- Phone Number Input \--\>  
\<div class="space-y-4"\>  
\<label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-300"\>Mobile Number\</label\>  
\<div class="flex gap-3"\>  
\<\!-- Country Code Selector \--\>  
\<div class="relative w-28 shrink-0"\>  
\<select class="w-full h-14 pl-10 pr-8 bg-surface-dark border border-border-dark rounded-xl text-white appearance-none focus:border-yabisso-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yabisso-blue transition-all font-medium text-lg"\>  
\<option value="+234"\>+234\</option\>  
\<option value="+254"\>+254\</option\>  
\<option value="+233"\>+233\</option\>  
\<option value="+27"\>+27\</option\>  
\</select\>  
\<span class="absolute left-3 top-1/2 \-translate-y-1/2 flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-gray-400 text-\[20px\]"\>public\</span\>  
\</span\>  
\<span class="absolute right-3 top-1/2 \-translate-y-1/2 pointer-events-none"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-gray-400 text-\[20px\]"\>expand\_more\</span\>  
\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Number Input \--\>  
\<div class="relative flex-1"\>  
\<input class="w-full h-14 bg-surface-dark border border-border-dark rounded-xl px-4 text-white placeholder-gray-500 focus:border-yabisso-blue focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yabisso-blue transition-all font-medium text-lg tracking-wide" placeholder="800 000 0000" type="tel" value="902 456 7890"/\>  
\<div class="absolute right-3 top-1/2 \-translate-y-1/2"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-yabisso-green text-\[20px\]"\>check\_circle\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Send Code Action \--\>  
\<button class="w-full h-14 bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 active:scale-\[0.98\] text-background-dark text-base font-bold rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2"\>  
\<span\>Get Code\</span\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[20px\]"\>send\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- OTP Section (Visualizing the verification state) \--\>  
\<div class="pt-6 border-t border-dashed border-border-dark space-y-6"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between"\>  
\<label class="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-300"\>Verification Code\</label\>  
\<button class="text-yabisso-blue text-sm font-semibold hover:text-blue-400 transition-colors"\>Resend Code\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3"\>  
\<input class="h-16 w-full text-center bg-surface-dark border border-yabisso-blue rounded-xl text-white text-2xl font-bold focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yabisso-blue focus:border-yabisso-blue transition-all shadow-\[0\_0\_15px\_rgba(19,127,236,0.15)\]" maxlength="1" type="text" value="5"/\>  
\<input class="h-16 w-full text-center bg-surface-dark border border-border-dark rounded-xl text-white text-2xl font-bold focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yabisso-blue focus:border-yabisso-blue transition-all" maxlength="1" placeholder="-" type="text"/\>  
\<input class="h-16 w-full text-center bg-surface-dark border border-border-dark rounded-xl text-white text-2xl font-bold focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yabisso-blue focus:border-yabisso-blue transition-all" maxlength="1" placeholder="-" type="text"/\>  
\<input class="h-16 w-full text-center bg-surface-dark border border-border-dark rounded-xl text-white text-2xl font-bold focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yabisso-blue focus:border-yabisso-blue transition-all" maxlength="1" placeholder="-" type="text"/\>  
\</div\>  
\<p class="text-xs text-gray-500 flex items-center gap-1"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[14px\]"\>timer\</span\>  
                        Auto-verifying in \<span class="text-white font-medium"\>00:24\</span\>  
\</p\>  
\<\!-- Verify Action \--\>  
\<button class="w-full h-14 bg-white/10 hover:bg-white/20 active:scale-\[0.98\] text-white border border-white/10 text-base font-bold rounded-xl shadow-lg transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2 backdrop-blur-sm"\>  
\<span\>Verify \&amp; Login\</span\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[20px\]"\>arrow\_forward\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Footer Support Link \--\>  
\<div class="mt-auto pt-8 text-center"\>  
\<p class="text-gray-500 text-sm"\>  
                    Having trouble? \<a class="text-white font-medium underline decoration-yabisso-blue decoration-2 underline-offset-4" href="\#"\>Contact Support\</a\>  
\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Decorative Bottom Strip (Brand Vibe) \--\>  
\<div class="h-1.5 w-full flex"\>  
\<div class="bg-yabisso-blue flex-1"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="bg-yabisso-red flex-1"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="bg-yabisso-yellow flex-1"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="bg-yabisso-green flex-1"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Background decorative elements for "Tech Vibe" \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-0 right-0 \-mr-20 \-mt-20 w-80 h-80 bg-yabisso-blue/5 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-0 left-0 \-ml-20 \-mb-20 w-60 h-60 bg-yabisso-red/5 rounded-full blur-3xl pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

écran : login sms (vérifier pin)

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso Login\</title\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                        "yabisso-red": "\#ef4444",  
                        "yabisso-yellow": "\#eab308",  
                        "yabisso-green": "\#22c55e",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {  
                        "DEFAULT": "0.5rem",  
                        "lg": "0.75rem",  
                        "xl": "1rem",  
                        "full": "9999px"  
                    },  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark font-display text-slate-900 dark:text-white min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-between"\>  
\<\!-- Geometric background accents (African Tech Vibe) \--\>  
\<div class="fixed top-0 left-0 w-full h-full overflow-hidden pointer-events-none z-0"\>  
\<div class="absolute top-\[-10%\] right-\[-10%\] w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-yabisso-green/10 blur-\[60px\]"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-\[20%\] left-\[-10%\] w-64 h-64 rounded-full bg-primary/10 blur-\[60px\]"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-\[-10%\] right-\[10%\] w-48 h-48 rounded-full bg-yabisso-yellow/5 blur-\[50px\]"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Main Content \--\>  
\<div class="relative z-10 flex flex-col w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-full p-6 pt-12 flex-grow"\>  
\<\!-- Header Section \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col items-center mb-10"\>  
\<\!-- Logo area with brand colors \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center gap-1 mb-6"\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-8 bg-primary rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-6 bg-yabisso-red rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-8 bg-yabisso-yellow rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-2 h-5 bg-yabisso-green rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<h1 class="text-white tracking-tight text-\[32px\] font-bold leading-tight text-center"\>Yabisso\</h1\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-400 text-lg font-medium leading-tight tracking-\[-0.015em\] text-center mt-2"\>Welcome back\</h2\>  
\<\!-- Offline Status Indicator \--\>  
\<div class="mt-4 flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-slate-800/50 border border-slate-700/50 backdrop-blur-sm"\>  
\<span class="relative flex h-2 w-2"\>  
\<span class="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-yabisso-green opacity-75"\>\</span\>  
\<span class="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-yabisso-green"\>\</span\>  
\</span\>  
\<span class="text-xs text-slate-400 font-medium"\>Offline mode ready\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Form Section \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-5 w-full"\>  
\<\!-- Email/Phone Input \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5"\>  
\<label class="text-sm font-medium text-slate-300 ml-1"\>Account\</label\>  
\<div class="relative flex items-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-4 text-slate-500"\>person\</span\>  
\<input class="w-full bg-\[\#192633\] text-white border border-\[\#324d67\] focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-xl h-14 pl-12 pr-4 placeholder:text-slate-500 transition-colors" placeholder="Phone number or Email" type="text"/\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Password Input \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-1.5"\>  
\<div class="flex justify-between items-center ml-1"\>  
\<label class="text-sm font-medium text-slate-300"\>Password\</label\>  
\<a class="text-sm font-medium text-primary hover:text-primary/80 transition-colors" href="\#"\>Forgot Password?\</a\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="relative flex items-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined absolute left-4 text-slate-500"\>lock\</span\>  
\<input class="w-full bg-\[\#192633\] text-white border border-\[\#324d67\] focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary rounded-xl h-14 pl-12 pr-12 placeholder:text-slate-500 transition-colors" placeholder="Enter your password" type="password"/\>  
\<button class="absolute right-4 text-slate-500 hover:text-white transition-colors flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>visibility\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Primary Login Button (White) \--\>  
\<button class="mt-4 w-full h-14 bg-white hover:bg-slate-100 text-black font-bold text-base rounded-xl transition-all shadow-lg active:scale-\[0.98\] flex items-center justify-center gap-2"\>  
\<span\>Log In\</span\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[20px\]"\>arrow\_forward\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<\!-- Divider \--\>  
\<div class="relative flex py-2 items-center"\>  
\<div class="flex-grow border-t border-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\<span class="flex-shrink-0 mx-4 text-slate-500 text-sm"\>or continue with\</span\>  
\<div class="flex-grow border-t border-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- SMS Fallback Button \--\>  
\<button class="w-full h-14 bg-\[\#192633\] hover:bg-\[\#1e2e3d\] border border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600 text-white font-medium text-base rounded-xl transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-3 active:scale-\[0.98\]"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary"\>sms\</span\>  
\<span\>Login via SMS / Offline Code\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Footer \--\>  
\<div class="mt-auto py-8 text-center"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-400 text-sm"\>  
                Don't have an account?   
                \<a class="text-primary font-semibold hover:underline" href="\#"\>Sign Up\</a\>  
\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

![][image6]

Écran : account recovery sms

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Account Recovery \- Yabisso\</title\>  
\<\!-- Google Fonts \--\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" rel="preconnect"/\>  
\<link crossorigin="" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" rel="preconnect"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700\&amp;family=Noto+Sans:wght@400;500;700\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<\!-- Material Symbols \--\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<\!-- Tailwind CSS \--\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<\!-- Theme Configuration \--\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
      tailwind.config \= {  
        darkMode: "class",  
        theme: {  
          extend: {  
            colors: {  
              "primary": "\#137fec",  
              "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
              "background-dark": "\#101922",  
              "surface-dark": "\#1c2630",  
              "yabisso-red": "\#ef4444",  
              "yabisso-yellow": "\#eab308",  
              "yabisso-green": "\#22c55e",  
            },  
            fontFamily: {  
              "display": \["Inter", "Noto Sans", "sans-serif"\]  
            },  
            borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "2xl": "1rem", "full": "9999px"},  
          },  
        },  
      }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
        body {  
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;  
        }  
        /\* Custom scrollbar for webkit \*/  
        ::-webkit-scrollbar {  
            width: 4px;  
        }  
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track {  
            background: \#101922;   
        }  
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {  
            background: \#324d67;   
            border-radius: 4px;  
        }  
        .radio-selected-ring:checked \+ div {  
            border-color: \#137fec;  
            background-color: rgba(19, 127, 236, 0.05);  
        }  
        .radio-selected-icon:checked \~ div .icon-box {  
            background-color: \#137fec;  
            color: white;  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark text-slate-900 dark:text-white min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center"\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-full min-h-screen w-full max-w-md flex-col bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark overflow-x-hidden mx-auto shadow-2xl"\>  
\<\!-- Top App Bar \--\>  
\<div class="sticky top-0 z-10 flex items-center bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark p-4 pb-2 justify-between border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<div class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white flex size-12 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-black/5 dark:hover:bg-white/10 cursor-pointer transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>arrow\_back\_ios\_new\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-lg font-bold leading-tight tracking-\[-0.015em\] flex-1 text-center pr-12"\>Recover Account\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Decorative Brand Bar (Yabisso Colors) \--\>  
\<div class="flex w-full h-1"\>  
\<div class="w-1/4 bg-primary"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-1/4 bg-yabisso-red"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-1/4 bg-yabisso-yellow"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-1/4 bg-yabisso-green"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-y-auto"\>  
\<\!-- Hero Illustration \--\>  
\<div class="w-full px-4 pt-6 pb-2"\>  
\<div class="w-full h-\[180px\] rounded-2xl bg-surface-dark relative overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center border border-gray-800" data-alt="Abstract security shield illustration with geometric tech patterns in dark blue tones" style="background-image: url('https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuCCfhUcnaiVgWqUpU5iicT9G5DXF8K9VfF39fG1cNXLC4Ua3WSTfWt3OCfcIyQ7vLS4cgIJz1RW71PWwivoCA-Zlo829-mU-eF8NiZELqCLmlUnTHNhxMuSJvrOnyT9cF5Ctl2xe24hrgTp6NfIjrpmCo8zoFcu9totdK96ZkVBHPihsXN68u78Oq3JEdqATHC6Yd2ITQZFjVtxY3aESxx2WUTU73NyDyDLKUHYT9cJRB3BwOUVzw8iRX9P68shuwi4l7zJ5JLN'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"\>  
\<\!-- Overlay Gradient \--\>  
\<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-background-dark/80 to-transparent"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Center Icon Overlay \--\>  
\<div class="relative z-10 bg-surface-dark/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 rounded-full border border-gray-700 shadow-xl"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-5xl"\>lock\_reset\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Headline Text \--\>  
\<div class="px-6 pt-4 pb-2"\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight text-\[26px\] font-bold leading-tight text-center"\>Get back into Yabisso\</h2\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-sm font-normal leading-relaxed pt-2 text-center"\>  
                    Choose how you want to recover your account and data to continue using your services.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Recovery Methods (Radio List) \--\>  
\<form class="flex flex-col gap-4 p-4 mt-2"\>  
\<\!-- Option 1: SMS \--\>  
\<label class="relative cursor-pointer group"\>  
\<input checked="" class="peer sr-only radio-selected-ring" name="recovery\_method" type="radio" value="sms"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-surface-dark p-4 transition-all duration-200 peer-checked:border-primary peer-checked:ring-1 peer-checked:ring-primary"\>  
\<div class="icon-box flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 transition-colors group-hover:bg-gray-200 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>smartphone\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col grow"\>  
\<div class="flex justify-between items-center w-full"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-semibold"\>Recover via SMS\</p\>  
\<div class="h-5 w-5 rounded-full border-2 border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-600 peer-checked:border-primary flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<div class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-primary opacity-0 peer-checked:opacity-100 transition-opacity"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-xs font-normal mt-1"\>We will send a code to your registered number\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Selection Indicator (Simulated with sibling selector above) \--\>  
\<div class="absolute right-4 top-4 pointer-events-none"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary opacity-0 peer-checked:opacity-100 transition-opacity"\>check\_circle\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</label\>  
\<\!-- Option 2: Drive Backup \--\>  
\<label class="relative cursor-pointer group"\>  
\<input class="peer sr-only radio-selected-ring" name="recovery\_method" type="radio" value="drive"/\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 rounded-xl border border-gray-300 dark:border-gray-700 bg-white dark:bg-surface-dark p-4 transition-all duration-200 peer-checked:border-primary peer-checked:ring-1 peer-checked:ring-primary"\>  
\<div class="icon-box flex h-10 w-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-gray-100 dark:bg-gray-800 text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 transition-colors group-hover:bg-gray-200 dark:group-hover:bg-gray-700"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>cloud\_download\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col grow"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-semibold"\>Restore Backup\</p\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-xs font-normal mt-1"\>Recover your offline data from Google Drive\</p\>  
\<\!-- Badge for Offline First \--\>  
\<div class="mt-2 flex"\>  
\<span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded bg-green-500/10 px-2 py-0.5 text-\[10px\] font-medium text-yabisso-green ring-1 ring-inset ring-green-500/20"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[12px\]"\>offline\_bolt\</span\>  
                                    OFFLINE DATA  
                                \</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute right-4 top-4 pointer-events-none"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary opacity-0 peer-checked:opacity-100 transition-opacity"\>check\_circle\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</label\>  
\<\!-- Dynamic Input Section (Shown visually always for design, implying conditional logic) \--\>  
\<div class="mt-4 pt-4 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 animate-fade-in"\>  
\<label class="block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 dark:text-slate-300 mb-2"\>Phone Number\</label\>  
\<div class="relative flex items-center"\>  
\<div class="absolute left-0 top-0 bottom-0 flex items-center pl-3 pointer-events-none z-10"\>  
\<span class="text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500 text-sm font-medium"\>+234\</span\>  
\<span class="w-px h-4 bg-gray-300 dark:bg-gray-600 mx-2"\>\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<input class="block w-full rounded-lg border-0 bg-gray-50 dark:bg-surface-dark py-3 pl-16 pr-4 text-slate-900 dark:text-white ring-1 ring-inset ring-gray-300 dark:ring-gray-700 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-inset focus:ring-primary sm:text-sm sm:leading-6" placeholder="800 000 0000" type="tel"/\>  
\<div class="absolute right-3 top-0 bottom-0 flex items-center text-slate-400"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[20px\]"\>call\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</form\>  
\<div class="h-10"\>\</div\> \<\!-- Spacer \--\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Bottom Action Area \--\>  
\<div class="w-full bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark p-4 border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<button class="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-white text-slate-900 py-3.5 px-4 text-base font-bold shadow-lg hover:bg-gray-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:ring-offset-2 dark:focus:ring-offset-background-dark transition-all"\>  
                Proceed  
            \</button\>  
\<div class="mt-4 flex justify-center"\>  
\<button class="text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 hover:text-primary dark:text-slate-400 dark:hover:text-primary transition-colors flex items-center gap-1"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[18px\]"\>help\</span\>  
\<span\>Contact Support\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

Écran : download pack 

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Download Packs Screen\</title\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                        "card-dark": "\#1b2531",  
                        "brand-red": "\#ef4444",  
                        "brand-yellow": "\#f59e0b",  
                        "brand-green": "\#10b981",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "Noto Sans", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: { "DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "2xl": "1rem", "full": "9999px" },  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
        /\* Custom scrollbar hiding \*/  
        .no-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar {  
            display: none;  
        }  
        .no-scrollbar {  
            \-ms-overflow-style: none;  
            scrollbar-width: none;  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark text-slate-900 dark:text-white font-display min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center"\>  
\<\!-- Mobile Container \--\>  
\<div class="w-full max-w-md bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark h-full min-h-screen relative shadow-xl overflow-hidden flex flex-col"\>  
\<\!-- Header Section \--\>  
\<header class="sticky top-0 z-10 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark border-b border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<\!-- Top App Bar \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center px-4 py-4 justify-between"\>  
\<button class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white flex size-10 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full hover:bg-gray-100 dark:hover:bg-gray-800 transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>arrow\_back\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-lg font-bold leading-tight flex-1 text-center pr-10"\>Manage Offline Packs\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Storage Usage Indicator \--\>  
\<div class="px-4 pb-4"\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-2"\>  
\<div class="flex justify-between items-end"\>  
\<p class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-medium"\>Device Storage\</p\>  
\<p class="text-primary text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider"\>Wi-Fi Only\</p\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="rounded-full bg-gray-200 dark:bg-\[\#324d67\] overflow-hidden h-3 w-full flex"\>  
\<div class="h-full bg-primary" style="width: 65%;"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-full bg-brand-yellow" style="width: 15%;"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex justify-between items-center text-xs text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\]"\>  
\<span\>32 GB Used\</span\>  
\<span\>64 GB Free\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Filter Chips \--\>  
\<div class="flex gap-3 px-4 pb-4 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar"\>  
\<button class="flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-x-2 rounded-full bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white px-5 transition-transform active:scale-95"\>  
\<span class="text-white dark:text-background-dark text-sm font-bold"\>All Packs\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<button class="flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-x-2 rounded-full bg-gray-200 dark:bg-\[\#233648\] px-5 transition-transform active:scale-95"\>  
\<span class="text-slate-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-sm font-medium"\>Installed\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<button class="flex h-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center gap-x-2 rounded-full bg-gray-200 dark:bg-\[\#233648\] px-5 transition-transform active:scale-95"\>  
\<span class="text-slate-700 dark:text-gray-300 text-sm font-medium"\>Updates (2)\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</header\>  
\<\!-- Main Content List \--\>  
\<main class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-4 pb-24"\>  
\<\!-- Section Label \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-2"\>  
\<h3 class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] uppercase tracking-wider"\>Essential Services\</h3\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Card: Pack Wallet (Not Downloaded) \--\>  
\<div class="group relative flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-card-dark p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-4 justify-between items-start"\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 flex-1"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-brand-green/10 dark:bg-brand-green/20 shrink-0 size-14 text-brand-green"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>account\_balance\_wallet\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col justify-center gap-0.5"\>  
\<h4 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-bold leading-tight"\>Yabisso Wallet\</h4\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-xs leading-normal"\>Offline payments \&amp; balance check\</p\>  
\<span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-\[10px\] font-mono text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[12px\]"\>sd\_storage\</span\> 12 MB  
                            \</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<button class="shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center size-10 rounded-full bg-gray-100 dark:bg-\[\#233648\] text-slate-400 hover:text-primary transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>more\_vert\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-1 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700/50 mt-1"\>  
\<span class="text-xs font-medium text-slate-400"\>v2.4.0 • Not Installed\</span\>  
\<button class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 h-9 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-background-dark text-sm font-bold shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[18px\]"\>download\</span\>  
                        Get Pack  
                     \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Card: Pack Loba (Installed) \--\>  
\<div class="group relative flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-card-dark p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-4 justify-between items-start"\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 flex-1"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-brand-red/10 dark:bg-brand-red/20 shrink-0 size-14 text-brand-red"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>shopping\_bag\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col justify-center gap-0.5"\>  
\<h4 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-bold leading-tight"\>Pack Loba\</h4\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-xs leading-normal"\>Marketplace full catalog \&amp; cache\</p\>  
\<span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-\[10px\] font-mono text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[12px\]"\>sd\_storage\</span\> 45 MB  
                            \</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="shrink-0"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-brand-green text-\[28px\]"\>check\_circle\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-1 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700/50 mt-1"\>  
\<span class="text-xs font-medium text-brand-green"\>Ready for offline use\</span\>  
\<button class="text-slate-400 hover:text-brand-red text-xs font-medium px-2 py-1 transition-colors"\>  
                        Manage  
                     \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Card: Events (Downloading) \--\>  
\<div class="group relative flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-card-dark p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-4 justify-between items-start"\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 flex-1"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-brand-yellow/10 dark:bg-brand-yellow/20 shrink-0 size-14 text-brand-yellow"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>confirmation\_number\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col justify-center gap-0.5 w-full"\>  
\<h4 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-bold leading-tight"\>Events \&amp; Tickets\</h4\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-xs leading-normal"\>Maps and venue guides\</p\>  
\<\!-- Inline Progress \--\>  
\<div class="mt-2 w-full max-w-\[140px\]"\>  
\<div class="flex justify-between text-\[10px\] text-slate-400 mb-1"\>  
\<span\>Downloading...\</span\>  
\<span\>45%\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="h-1.5 w-full bg-gray-200 dark:bg-\[\#324d67\] rounded-full overflow-hidden"\>  
\<div class="h-full bg-primary w-\[45%\] rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<button class="shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center size-8 rounded-full border border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-700 text-slate-400 hover:text-brand-red hover:border-brand-red transition-colors"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[18px\]"\>close\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Section Label \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-4"\>  
\<h3 class="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] uppercase tracking-wider"\>Entertainment\</h3\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Card: Music (Update Available) \--\>  
\<div class="group relative flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-card-dark p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-4 justify-between items-start"\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 flex-1"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-purple-500/10 dark:bg-purple-500/20 shrink-0 size-14 text-purple-500"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>headphones\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col justify-center gap-0.5"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center gap-2"\>  
\<h4 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-bold leading-tight"\>AfroBeats Stream\</h4\>  
\<span class="bg-brand-yellow text-background-dark text-\[9px\] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded"\>UPDATE\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-xs leading-normal"\>Offline playlist caching\</p\>  
\<span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-\[10px\] font-mono text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[12px\]"\>sd\_storage\</span\> 120 MB  
                            \</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-1 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700/50 mt-1"\>  
\<span class="text-xs font-medium text-brand-yellow"\>Update Available (v3.1)\</span\>  
\<button class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 h-9 rounded-lg bg-gray-100 dark:bg-\[\#233648\] text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-bold shadow-sm active:scale-95 transition-transform"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[18px\]"\>sync\</span\>  
                        Update  
                     \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Card: Maps (Not Installed) \--\>  
\<div class="group relative flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-2xl bg-white dark:bg-card-dark p-4 shadow-sm border border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-800 opacity-60 hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"\>  
\<div class="flex gap-4 justify-between items-start"\>  
\<div class="flex items-start gap-4 flex-1"\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-blue-400/10 dark:bg-blue-400/20 shrink-0 size-14 text-blue-400"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>map\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col justify-center gap-0.5"\>  
\<h4 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-base font-bold leading-tight"\>City Maps\</h4\>  
\<p class="text-slate-500 dark:text-\[\#92adc9\] text-xs leading-normal"\>Navigation \&amp; POIs\</p\>  
\<span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 text-\[10px\] font-mono text-slate-400 dark:text-slate-500"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[12px\]"\>sd\_storage\</span\> 250 MB  
                            \</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="flex items-center justify-between pt-1 border-t border-gray-100 dark:border-gray-700/50 mt-1"\>  
\<span class="text-xs font-medium text-slate-400"\>Not Installed\</span\>  
\<button class="flex items-center gap-2 px-4 h-9 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-600 text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-bold active:scale-95 transition-transform"\>  
                        Download  
                     \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Bottom spacing \--\>  
\<div class="h-8"\>\</div\>  
\</main\>  
\<\!-- Bottom Actions \--\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-0 w-full bg-white/80 dark:bg-background-dark/90 backdrop-blur-md border-t border-gray-200 dark:border-gray-800 p-4"\>  
\<button class="w-full h-12 rounded-xl bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-white font-bold text-base flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 active:scale-\[0.98\] transition-all"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined"\>cloud\_download\</span\>  
                Update All Packs  
            \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>
