Écran : first time onboarding 

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso Onboarding \- Offline First\</title\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;700;800\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "accent-red": "\#ef4444",  
                        "accent-yellow": "\#eab308",  
                        "accent-green": "\#22c55e",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {  
                        "DEFAULT": "0.25rem",  
                        "lg": "0.5rem",  
                        "xl": "0.75rem",  
                        "full": "9999px"  
                    },  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
        /\* Custom gradient for the African Tech vibe \*/  
        .african-gradient {  
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15) 0%, rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.15) 50%, rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15) 100%);  
        }  
        .hero-glow {  
            box-shadow: 0 0 80px \-20px rgba(19, 127, 236, 0.3);  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="font-display antialiased bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark text-slate-900 dark:text-white selection:bg-primary selection:text-white"\>  
\<\!-- Main Container \--\>  
\<div class="relative flex min-h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-hidden max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark"\>  
\<\!-- Header / Status Area \--\>  
\<header class="flex w-full items-center justify-between px-6 py-6 pt-12 z-10"\>  
\<\!-- Logo placeholder \--\>  
\<div class="flex items-center gap-2"\>  
\<div class="h-8 w-8 rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-tr from-primary via-accent-yellow to-accent-red flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-white text-\[20px\]"\>bolt\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<span class="text-lg font-bold tracking-tight dark:text-white"\>Yabisso\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Language or help icon if needed, kept empty for clean look \--\>  
\</header\>  
\<\!-- Main Content Area \--\>  
\<main class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center px-6 relative z-0"\>  
\<\!-- Abstract Background Decorations for "African Tech Vibe" \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-1/4 left-0 w-64 h-64 bg-accent-green/10 rounded-full blur-3xl \-translate-x-1/2 pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-1/3 right-0 w-64 h-64 bg-accent-red/10 rounded-full blur-3xl translate-x-1/2 pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Illustration Container \--\>  
\<div class="relative w-full aspect-square max-w-\[340px\] mb-8 flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<\!-- Circular background glow \--\>  
\<div class="absolute inset-4 rounded-full african-gradient blur-xl opacity-60"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Main Image \--\>  
\<div class="relative w-full h-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-2xl hero-glow bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-800 to-slate-900 border border-slate-700/50 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-6" data-alt="Stylized 3D smartphone floating with colorful icons for wallet, food, and shopping disconnected from wifi signal but still glowing"\>  
\<\!-- Simulated Illustration using CSS/Icons since we can't generate raw SVG assets dynamically \--\>  
\<div class="relative flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full w-full"\>  
\<\!-- Abstract connectivity waves \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-4 left-1/2 \-translate-x-1/2 flex flex-col gap-1 items-center opacity-40"\>  
\<div class="w-16 h-1 bg-slate-600 rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="w-24 h-1 bg-slate-600 rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Central Icon Group \--\>  
\<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-4"\>  
\<div class="h-16 w-16 bg-accent-yellow/20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-accent-yellow/30"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-accent-yellow text-3xl"\>shopping\_bag\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="h-16 w-16 bg-accent-red/20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-accent-red/30"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-accent-red text-3xl"\>restaurant\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="h-16 w-16 bg-accent-green/20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-accent-green/30"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-accent-green text-3xl"\>account\_balance\_wallet\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<div class="h-16 w-16 bg-primary/20 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center border border-primary/30 relative"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-3xl"\>wifi\_off\</span\>  
\<\!-- Small checkmark badge \--\>  
\<div class="absolute \-bottom-2 \-right-2 h-6 w-6 bg-white dark:bg-slate-200 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-md"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-accent-green text-sm font-bold"\>check\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Phone silhouette bottom \--\>  
\<div class="w-32 h-1 bg-white/20 rounded-full mt-4"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Text Content \--\>  
\<div class="w-full flex flex-col items-center text-center gap-3 relative z-10"\>  
\<h1 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight text-\[32px\] font-bold leading-\[1.15\]"\>  
                    No Internet? \<br/\>  
\<span class="text-primary"\>No Problem.\</span\>  
\</h1\>  
\<p class="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 text-base font-normal leading-relaxed max-w-\[320px\]"\>  
                    Yabisso is built for real life. Browse products, manage your wallet, and place orders anytime—even without a data connection.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</main\>  
\<\!-- Footer / Navigation \--\>  
\<footer class="flex flex-col w-full px-6 pb-8 pt-4 bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark z-10"\>  
\<\!-- Page Indicators \--\>  
\<div class="flex w-full flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2.5 py-6"\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-8 rounded-full bg-primary transition-all duration-300"\>\</div\> \<\!-- Active \- wider \--\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Button Group \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-3 w-full"\>  
\<button class="flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-xl h-14 px-5 bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors text-white text-\[17px\] font-bold leading-normal tracking-\[0.015em\] shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/20 active:scale-\[0.98\]"\>  
\<span class="truncate"\>Next\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\<button class="flex w-full cursor-pointer items-center justify-center overflow-hidden rounded-xl h-12 px-5 bg-transparent hover:bg-slate-200 dark:hover:bg-slate-800 transition-colors text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-base font-semibold leading-normal tracking-\[0.015em\]"\>  
\<span class="truncate"\>Skip\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Safe Area Spacer for iOS Home Indicator \--\>  
\<div class="h-2"\>\</div\>  
\</footer\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

ecran2 : first time onboarding 

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso Onboarding \- All-in-One Services\</title\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                        "brand-yellow": "\#FFC107",  
                        "brand-red": "\#FF5252",  
                        "brand-green": "\#4CAF50",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: {"DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px"},  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
        body {  
            font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;  
        }  
    \</style\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body class="bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark text-slate-900 dark:text-white antialiased"\>  
\<\!-- Main Container \--\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-full min-h-screen w-full flex-col overflow-hidden max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark border-x border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800"\>  
\<\!-- Header: Skip Button \--\>  
\<div class="flex px-6 pt-8 pb-2 justify-end z-20"\>  
\<button class="flex items-center justify-center rounded-full h-8 px-4 bg-transparent text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 text-sm font-medium hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white transition-colors"\>  
\<span\>Skip\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Main Content Area \--\>  
\<div class="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center relative px-6"\>  
\<\!-- Abstract Background Glow \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 \-translate-x-1/2 \-translate-y-1/2 w-64 h-64 bg-primary/20 blur-\[100px\] rounded-full pointer-events-none"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Central Illustration \--\>  
\<div class="relative w-full max-w-\[320px\] aspect-square flex items-center justify-center mb-8"\>  
\<\!-- Orbit Rings (Decoration) \--\>  
\<div class="absolute w-full h-full rounded-full border border-slate-200/10 dark:border-white/5 animate-spin-slow" style="animation-duration: 20s;"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="absolute w-3/4 h-3/4 rounded-full border border-slate-200/20 dark:border-white/10 animate-spin-slow" style="animation-duration: 15s; animation-direction: reverse;"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Central Phone Mockup Area \--\>  
\<div class="relative w-32 h-56 bg-slate-800 rounded-\[2rem\] border-4 border-slate-700 shadow-2xl flex flex-col overflow-hidden items-center justify-center z-10"\>  
\<div class="absolute top-0 w-20 h-4 bg-slate-700 rounded-b-xl z-20"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Screen Content \--\>  
\<div class="w-full h-full bg-slate-900 flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2 p-2"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-4xl text-white"\>grid\_view\</span\>  
\<div class="h-1 w-12 bg-slate-700 rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-1 w-8 bg-slate-700 rounded-full"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Offline Badge \--\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-3 flex items-center gap-1 bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full border border-white/10"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[10px\] text-green-400"\>wifi\_off\</span\>  
\<span class="text-\[8px\] font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider"\>Offline Ready\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Floating Service Icons \--\>  
\<\!-- Wallet (Yellow) \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-10 right-8 w-14 h-14 bg-brand-yellow/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-brand-yellow/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-brand-yellow/20 animate-bounce" style="animation-duration: 3s;"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-brand-yellow text-2xl"\>account\_balance\_wallet\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Food (Red) \--\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-12 left-6 w-14 h-14 bg-brand-red/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-brand-red/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-brand-red/20 animate-bounce" style="animation-duration: 4s; animation-delay: 0.5s;"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-brand-red text-2xl"\>restaurant\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Shopping (Green) \--\>  
\<div class="absolute bottom-20 right-4 w-12 h-12 bg-brand-green/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-brand-green/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-brand-green/20 animate-bounce" style="animation-duration: 3.5s; animation-delay: 1s;"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-brand-green text-xl"\>shopping\_bag\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Transport (Blue) \--\>  
\<div class="absolute top-20 left-4 w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 backdrop-blur-sm border border-primary/30 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-primary/20 animate-bounce" style="animation-duration: 4.5s; animation-delay: 0.2s;"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-primary text-xl"\>local\_taxi\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Text Content \--\>  
\<div class="w-full text-center z-10 flex flex-col gap-3 px-2"\>  
\<h1 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight text-\[32px\] font-bold leading-\[1.1\]"\>  
                    Everything You Need,\<br/\> One App  
                \</h1\>  
\<p class="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-400 text-base font-normal leading-relaxed max-w-\[320px\] mx-auto"\>  
                    Manage your wallet, order food, shop online, and book rides. The ultimate offline-first super-app experience.  
                \</p\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Footer Area \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col w-full pb-8 pt-6 bg-transparent z-20"\>  
\<\!-- Page Indicators \--\>  
\<div class="flex w-full flex-row items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-8"\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700 transition-colors"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-6 rounded-full bg-primary transition-all"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-slate-700 transition-colors"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Action Buttons \--\>  
\<div class="flex w-full items-center justify-between px-6"\>  
\<\!-- Back Button \--\>  
\<button class="h-12 px-6 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-400 font-semibold text-sm hover:text-slate-900 dark:hover:text-white transition-colors"\>  
                    Back  
                \</button\>  
\<\!-- Next Button \--\>  
\<button class="h-12 px-8 flex items-center justify-center gap-2 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-background-dark font-bold text-sm hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity shadow-lg shadow-primary/10"\>  
\<span\>Next\</span\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-lg font-bold"\>arrow\_forward\</span\>  
\</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

écran 3: first time onboarding 

\<\!DOCTYPE html\>

\<html class="dark" lang="en"\>\<head\>  
\<meta charset="utf-8"/\>  
\<meta content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/\>  
\<title\>Yabisso Onboarding\</title\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800\&amp;family=Noto+Sans:wght@400;500;700\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Material+Symbols+Outlined:wght,FILL@100..700,0..1\&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/\>  
\<script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com?plugins=forms,container-queries"\>\</script\>  
\<script id="tailwind-config"\>  
        tailwind.config \= {  
            darkMode: "class",  
            theme: {  
                extend: {  
                    colors: {  
                        "primary": "\#137fec",  
                        "background-light": "\#f6f7f8",  
                        "background-dark": "\#101922",  
                    },  
                    fontFamily: {  
                        "display": \["Inter", "sans-serif"\]  
                    },  
                    borderRadius: { "DEFAULT": "0.25rem", "lg": "0.5rem", "xl": "0.75rem", "full": "9999px" },  
                },  
            },  
        }  
    \</script\>  
\<style\>  
    body {  
      min-height: max(884px, 100dvh);  
    }  
  \</style\>  
  \</head\>  
\<body\>  
\<div class="relative flex h-auto min-h-screen w-full flex-col bg-background-light dark:bg-background-dark group/design-root overflow-x-hidden font-display text-slate-900 dark:text-white"\>  
\<\!-- Hero Section with Image \--\>  
\<div class="@container w-full relative"\>  
\<div class="w-full h-\[45vh\] relative overflow-hidden"\>  
\<\!-- Background Gradient Overlay for text readability at top if needed, and blending at bottom \--\>  
\<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-b from-black/20 via-transparent to-background-light dark:to-background-dark z-10"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Hero Image \--\>  
\<div class="w-full h-full bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-cover" data-alt="Futuristic abstract network visualization glowing blue nodes connecting to a central point" style='background-image: url("https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/aida-public/AB6AXuABcx8uDtIGST6YazxuT7JbzfGOQma\_cLHLuvC4u8AT33-PZBYn70uA-WUMAj5N9xP2ycQ3U0WDWIKCqF\_i6ZxblIxqfO70y\_9YzD9saDOzpFqxkfy8OfGSx7826Hq\_wCP-VDgb7vtK2NrDTFw-2Qb69\_4tLFKQSv60rpNu8OIfpKsPh\_JIjCCnuP2RynfmWT\_HpZO81b2M0jYYMU06u7MZwHobIp8cdtpQWDRzYkGtPdGlxGXYnIyucF2YK\_cDvyEvGLxCmSkb");'\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Main Content Container \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-1 flex-col justify-end px-5 pb-8 \-mt-10 z-20"\>  
\<\!-- Headline \--\>  
\<h1 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white tracking-tight text-\[32px\] font-bold leading-tight text-center mb-3"\>  
                Seamless Connectivity  
            \</h1\>  
\<\!-- Body Text \--\>  
\<p class="text-slate-600 dark:text-slate-300 text-base font-normal leading-relaxed text-center mb-8 px-2"\>  
                No internet? No problem. Use Yabisso via 4G, SMS, or our offline mesh network to stay connected anywhere.  
            \</p\>  
\<\!-- Feature Grid \--\>  
\<div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3 mb-8"\>  
\<\!-- Online Card \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-\[\#324d67\] bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] p-4 items-center justify-center shadow-sm"\>  
\<div class="text-\[\#137fec\] p-2 bg-\[\#137fec\]/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>wifi\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-bold leading-tight"\>Online\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- SMS Card \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-\[\#324d67\] bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] p-4 items-center justify-center shadow-sm"\>  
\<div class="text-\[\#facc15\] p-2 bg-\[\#facc15\]/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>chat\_bubble\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-bold leading-tight"\>SMS\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Mesh Card \--\>  
\<div class="flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 dark:border-\[\#324d67\] bg-white dark:bg-\[\#192633\] p-4 items-center justify-center shadow-sm"\>  
\<div class="text-\[\#22c55e\] p-2 bg-\[\#22c55e\]/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center"\>  
\<span class="material-symbols-outlined text-\[28px\]"\>hub\</span\>  
\</div\>  
\<h2 class="text-slate-900 dark:text-white text-sm font-bold leading-tight"\>Mesh\</h2\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Page Indicators \--\>  
\<div class="flex w-full flex-row items-center justify-center gap-2 mb-8"\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-\[\#324d67\]"\>\</div\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-300 dark:bg-\[\#324d67\]"\>\</div\>  
\<\!-- Active indicator is elongated and primary color \--\>  
\<div class="h-2 w-8 rounded-full bg-primary"\>\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\<\!-- Primary Action Button \--\>  
\<button class="w-full rounded-xl bg-slate-900 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-black font-bold text-lg h-14 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-slate-800 dark:hover:bg-slate-200 transition-colors shadow-lg"\>  
                Start Exploring Yabisso  
            \</button\>  
\</div\>  
\</div\>  
\</body\>\</html\>

\</div\>

\</div\>

\</header\>  
\<main class="flex flex-col gap-6 p-5 pt-2"\>  
\<section\>
